about.pageSubtitle: Empowering Africa's healthcare infrastructure since 2010 — from Kinshasa to Johannesburg.
about.missionBody: Aksantimed was founded with a single, enduring mission: to ensure that every clinic, hospital, and health professional across Central and Southern Africa has reliable access to verified, high-quality medical supplies — at the right time, at the right standard.
about.missionBody2: We bridge the gap between global medical innovation and the African healthcare systems that need it most. Through our dual presence in the DRC and South Africa, we operate as both a distributor and a partner — investing in relationships, not just transactions.
about.teamSubtitle: A team built on healthcare expertise and African ambition
about.teamBody: The Aksantimed team brings together professionals from medicine, logistics, supply chain, and public health — united by a commitment to improving healthcare access across the continent.
about.contactSubtitle: Whether you're a procurement officer, a clinic director, or a healthcare NGO — we'd like to hear from you.
about.value1Body: Every product in our catalog is sourced from verified manufacturers and meets international medical standards. We never compromise on the safety of the healthcare professionals and patients we serve.
about.value2Body: From our dual headquarters in Kinshasa and Johannesburg, we supply clinics, hospitals, and pharmacies across Central and Southern Africa — bridging the gap between global medical innovation and local healthcare needs.
about.value3Body: Healthcare never stands still. We continuously expand our catalog with the latest diagnostic tools, surgical supplies, and pharmaceutical advances so that our partners always have access to what's newest and most effective.
about.value4Body: Behind every order is a healthcare professional working to save lives. We treat every partnership with the urgency, care, and respect that mission deserves.
about.milestone1Body: Aksantimed was established with a mission to make quality medical supplies accessible across the Democratic Republic of Congo.
about.milestone2Body: Signed agreements with major hospitals in Kinshasa and Lubumbashi, becoming a trusted institutional supplier.
about.milestone3Body: Opened our second headquarters in Sandton, Johannesburg, extending our supply chain and reach into Southern Africa.
about.milestone4Body: Launched our online product catalog to streamline procurement for clinics and healthcare providers across the continent.
about.milestone5Body: Our catalog continues to expand with new pharmaceutical, diagnostic, and surgical supply partnerships across Africa and beyond.

footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to receive updates on new products, special offers, and health news.
footer.brandDesc: Empowering health, enriching lives. Aksantimed is a trusted medical supply company providing high-quality pharmaceuticals, medical devices, and health supplies to professionals and consumers across Central and Southern Africa.
